headline: RTX raises full-year outlook after strong second-quarter earnings (NYSE:RTX)
summary: RTX (NYSE:RTX) shares surged nearly 6% in premarket trading on Thursday after the aerospace and defence company reported second-quarter earnings and revenue ahead of Wall Street expectations while increasing its financial guidance for the full year. The stronger outlook reflected robust demand across both its commercial aerospace and defence businesses, supported by a record order backlog.

The stronger outlook reflected robust demand across both its commercial aerospace and defence businesses, supported by a record order backlog.

headline: RTX (NYSE:RTX) Reports Upbeat Q2 CY2026, Stock Soars
summary: Aerospace and defense company Raytheon (NYSE:RTX) reported Q2 CY2026 results beating Wall Street’s revenue expectations, with sales up 14.5% year on year to $24.71 billion. The company’s full-year revenue guidance of $95.5 billion at the midpoint came in 1.5% above analysts’ estimates. Its non-GAAP profit of $1.89 per share was 13.7% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

Its non-GAAP profit of $1.89 per share was 13.7% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Lockheed Martin, Quest Diagnostics, Thermo Fisher Scientific And Other Big Stocks Moving Higher On Thursday
summary: U.S. stocks were down as Dow Jones fell 450 points on Thursday. Lockheed Martin (LMT) shares rose 11.4% on better-than-expected results. Other big gainers were NVE Corp (NVEC), Gibo Holdings Ltd (GIBO), Novocure Ltd (NVCR), Cleveland-Cliffs Inc (CLF), Merlin Inc (MRLN), Medpace Holdings Inc (MEDP), Oatly Group AB (OTLY), Imax Corp (IMAX), United Rentals Inc (URI), Oceaneering International Inc (OII), and Quest Diagnostics Inc (DGX).
